home.bio: 3+ years building cross-platform mobile, web & desktop apps. Specialising in Flutter and React — shipped on App Store, Google Play & Microsoft Store. Actively using AI tools to ship faster.

about.heading: About Me
about.bio: Software Engineer with 3+ years of experience specialising in Flutter for cross-platform mobile, web, and desktop applications. Strong expertise in Bloc/Provider, Clean Architecture, CI/CD pipelines, and real-time systems (MQTT, WebSocket). Experienced in Android Native (Kotlin/Java) and ReactJS. Actively leveraging AI tools — Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor — to accelerate development and improve code quality.

projects.name: SkyJoy
projects.description: A loyalty & banking app — SkyPoint accumulation, redemption across 250+ brands, and an integrated wallet (SkyPay / Galaxy Pay). Partners: VPBank YOYO, HDBank, Vikki, HD Insurance, Furama Resort, bTaskee.
bullets: Built cross-platform loyalty & banking features (iOS & Android).
Integrated multi-partner APIs for point conversion & tier management (Sky+, Gold Plus).

jobs.company: Quoc Viet Trading and Engineering Co., Ltd

projects.name: Syrup Mixing System
projects.description: Web & cross-platform system for Suntory PepsiCo factories that automates the syrup mixing process — accurate ingredient control, batch tracking, and efficient production operations.

projects.name: Smart Form Interface
projects.description: Multi-platform solution streamlining report generation through digitized forms, automated workflows, and operational data visualization.
bullets: Release management: owned merging, versioning & publishing to App Store, Google Play, Microsoft Store; mentored 1 developer.
CI/CD & DevOps: built and maintained Jenkins / Fastlane / PowerShell pipelines for automated testing & deployment.
Quality & stakeholders: wrote unit tests for stability; ran onsite user training and gathered requirements directly with clients.

projects.name: Onsky SkyHealth
projects.description: Healthcare monitoring mobile app for remote patient & child observation, integrating IoT device management and live camera streaming.
bullets: Native Android: maintained & optimized the codebase, resolving complex issues for app stability.
Camera integration: integrated specialized third-party SDKs (VStarCam) for robust live streaming and remote control.
Hybrid architecture: embedded Flutter modules into the native Android app.

projects.name: Onsky SkyCare
projects.description: Web & mobile apps integrated with IoT medical devices for healthcare monitoring and device management.
bullets: Feature development: delivered mobile features in Flutter; authored unit tests and built CI/CD pipelines.
Release management: managed end-to-end publishing to Google Play and the App Store.

portfolio.heading: Portfolio
portfolio.subheading: A selection of my latest projects

projects.SkyJoy: SkyJoy — Loyalty & Rewards platform for Vietjet Air
projects.Smart Form Interface: Digitized form & reporting system for PepsiCo factories — automated workflows and real-time data visualization across mobile, web & Windows.
projects.Syrup Mixing: Cross-platform automation system for PepsiCo syrup production — batch tracking, ingredient control & Zebra scanner integration.
projects.TeamPower: HR & team management web platform with role-based dashboards, project tracking and API integrations.
projects.Ail Global: Corporate website with modern design, multi-section layout, and third-party API integrations.
projects.OnSky Health: Health management mobile app with patient tracking, appointments, and medical records.
projects.QV Car: Car management and booking mobile application with real-time tracking and service scheduling.
projects.SkyCare: Healthcare platform connecting patients with caregivers for seamless remote care management.
projects.Spotify Flutter: Full-featured Spotify clone with authentication, music playback, playlists, and cross-platform support.
projects.Dashboard: Admin dashboard with product management, sales charts, calendar integration, and e-commerce analytics.
